猜想.摘要: The molecule is an extremely large, heavily arylated, donor-acceptor-poor boron-containing hydrocarbon with dominant aromatic-core character, very low hetero-atom burden, no ESIPT-ready motif, and no meaningful donor-acceptor partitioning. TICT was the only credible challenger because of rotor richness, but both internal topology evidence and external close-family precedent indicate that rotor richness here is distributed over a large aromatic scaffold rather than organized into a focused donor-acceptor twisting architecture. The newly completed planarity/compactness geometry-proxy screen closes the main internal gap and further supports a neutral-aromatic, rigid-core-dominated interpretation.

最终证据摘要: Top1 is neutral aromatic (0.79) and top2 is TICT (0.11). The latest evidence strengthens the current top1 because the completed macro planarity/compactness screen adds the previously missing internal pairwise discriminator and is consistent with a highly aromatic, compact, rigid-core scaffold rather than a focused donor-acceptor twisting motif. The top2 challenger TICT is weakened modestly: rotor richness still exists, but the new geometry-proxy evidence does not supply a stronger TICT-specific precondition and instead fits distributed peripheral freedom around a dominant aromatic core. An additional candidate, unknown, decreases because procedural uncertainty is reduced now that the intended task actually ran. No still-credible additional hypothesis remains in coverage debt. The case is legitimately in pairwise contraction, not portfolio screening, because ICT, TICT, and ESIPT have all been directly screened and coverage debt is empty. The key remaining discriminator is no longer broad screening but whether the combined internal structural evidence plus sufficient external close-family verifier support is enough to justify closure against TICT. The chosen next action is to finalize on a best-available basis because the intended closure-justification task has now been completed, verifier supplementation is already sufficient, and no higher-information unresolved direct screen remains.

The molecule is an extremely large, heavily arylated, donor-acceptor-poor boron-containing hydrocarbon with dominant aromatic-core character, very low hetero-atom burden, no ESIPT-ready motif, and no meaningful donor-acceptor partitioning. TICT was the only credible challenger because of rotor richness, but both internal topology evidence and external close-family precedent indicate that rotor richness here is distributed over a large aromatic scaffold rather than organized into a focused donor-acceptor twisting architecture. The newly completed planarity/compactness geometry-proxy screen closes the main internal gap and further supports a neutral-aromatic, rigid-core-dominated interpretation.

Verifier supplementation for neutral aromatic vs TICT is already sufficient. No exact-identity literature hit was found, but close-family evidence supports neutral-aromatic/AIE interpretations for heavily arylated donor-acceptor-poor boron-containing systems and frames TICT as usually requiring stronger donor-acceptor twisting prerequisites than are supported here.

Closure justification is now sufficient on a best-available basis because the previously missing internal pairwise geometry-proxy task has been completed successfully and aligns with the already sufficient external verifier supplement.

Portfolio screening remains complete and no alternative has reopened. The latest evidence is a successfully executed bounded macro pairwise geometry-proxy screen, so the case remains legitimately contracted to neutral aromatic versus TICT.

Macro was the correct capability for the missing closure task because the required observable was exactly a registry-backed geometry-proxy screen. Verifier supplementation is already sufficient and no additional verifier call is necessary. Microscopic was not the correct route for the prior failed attempt because the requested capability was macro-native rather than an Amesp action.

Latest evidence: successful macro execution of screen_planarity_compactness using shared structure context. Key geometry proxies remain strongly aromatic-core-consistent: planarity_proxy=0.987043, compactness_proxy=0.964276, aromatic_ring_count=12, rotatable_bond_count=14, branch_point_count=34, hetero_atom_count=2, donor_acceptor_partition_proxy=0.0, conformer_dispersion_proxy=1.0. This adds the previously missing internal pairwise geometry-proxy evidence and does not introduce contrary chemical evidence.
